command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== ALL openclaw log activity in last 3 minutes (unfiltered) ==="
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "3 minutes ago" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -30

echo ""
echo "=== Check the telegram ingress spool for received messages ==="
ls -la /home/jose/.openclaw/telegram/ingress-spool-default/ 2>/dev/null | tail -10

echo ""
echo "=== getUpdates manually to see if YOUR message is sitting there unprocessed ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/getWebhookInfo' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin).get('result',{}); print('pending:', d.get('pending_update_count'), '| last_error:', repr(d.get('last_error_message')))"
REMOTE
